I would like to pray for peace in the whole world. If
lasting peace could be achieved with different schools of
astrology and between astrologers, then that itself will be
major miracle, forget even the global peace.
Chapter seven –
earth quakes-
DR.B.V.RAMAN had written a book on predicting earthquakes.
This will give you good idea on how to predict quakes.
Let us see the list of the earthquakes in India, which has
been vicious, killer and made huge loss to property and
lives. Generally if the intensity of the earthquake is
above six in richter scale, then is is devastating.
